description_long: This is a compact, square-topped stool with a robust metal frame and four straight legs. The top surface is flat and smooth, with rounded corners for safety and comfort. Below the seat, there is a slatted lower shelf made of parallel metal bars, providing additional support and a place for small items. The entire structure is uniform in color, with a matte black finish that gives it a modern, industrial look. The stool's design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. Its sturdy construction suggests it is suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or garages.
description: A sturdy, square metal stool with a flat top, rounded corners, and a slatted lower shelf, finished in matte black. Its minimal, industrial design is functional and robust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat top, four legs, and the slatted lower shelf clearly visible beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stool and the parallel arrangement of the slats on the lower shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the slatted shelf and leg structure visible, mirroring the front view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and the slatted shelf, with the same features as the other side.
